overall.description: Static first-person view from inside a dark wooden cabin or shelter looking out through an open doorway toward an overcast coastal scene. The interior features rough wooden plank construction with minimal light, while the exterior shows a gray cloudy sky and distant shoreline, rendered in game engine graphics typical of survival games.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains static inside a dark wooden cabin with rough plank walls and ceiling. Through the open central doorway, an overcast coastal scene is visible with gray skies and a distant shoreline. A small window on the right wall provides a secondary view of the gloomy weather outside. No movement or action occurs throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from within a dim wooden shelter looking out toward a gloomy coastal horizon. It begins inside a dark cabin characterized by rough plank walls and a low ceiling, where the interior shadows contrast with the light from the exterior. Through the open central doorway, the view extends toward a distant shoreline under a heavy, overcast sky. The scene remains still, with a small window on the right wall providing a secondary glimpse of the gray, oppressive weather outside.
